name: Strawberry Balm Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and hull the strawberries. Crush them with the back of a wooden spoon or potato masher.
2. Line a medium bowl with cheesecloth. Pour in the crushed strawberries and their juice, then gather up the corners of the cloth to squeeze out all the juice.
3. Weigh the extracted juice. Combine it with an equal amount of sugar and lemon balm in a non-aluminum saucepan.
4. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat. Boil for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, skim any foam that forms. Allow to cool completely.
6. Discard the lemon balm before bottling into sterilized jars or bottles.
7. Store in refrigerator.
Delicious with ice cream, waffles, or mixed with sparkling water and ice to make a refreshing drink. You can also experiment with lemongrass or thyme for different variations.
